channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why the human body has so many design flaws
item.description: Many of the body's biggest flaws are the result of evolution building on old designs instead of starting over. Our spine, eyes, teeth, pelvis, and eve...

item.title: Scientists warn invasive Asian mantises are threatening Europe's wildlife
item.description: Two striking Asian praying mantis species that have rapidly spread across Europe have now been officially classified as invasive, raising new concerns...

item.title: Rare fossil goose reshapes understanding of New Zealand's giant birds
item.description: A newly discovered fossil goose challenges a long-held theory about bird evolution in New Zealand.

item.title: Europe's most active volcano may have a hidden origin
item.description: Mount Etna defies classic volcano formation theories; a new study proposes an alternative origin.
